name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
❤️❤️Lady Dior Ultra-Mini Mirror Bead, lined with sheep tendon, meticulously crafted, paired with mirror thread combination hand embroidery and light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm to elevate the style. With detachable chain strap and adjustable, detachable leather strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, an ideal choice for daily or evening looks. Dimensions: 12 x 10.2 x 5 cm
